location.name: Glacial Vale
location.description: A sheltered valley between ice mountains where ancient forests of petrified trees stand frozen mid-growth. Crystal formations dot the landscape, humming with trapped magical energy. The vale is beautiful and deeply wrong.

enemies.name: Crystal Spider
enemies.description: A spider with a body of living crystal. Its webs are threads of ice that shatter on contact but leave deep cuts.

enemies.name: Frozen Treant
enemies.description: One of the petrified trees has woken — a massive creature of ice-bound wood that moves with glacial slowness and terrible force.

enemies.name: Vale Phantom
enemies.description: The ghost of someone who died in the vale centuries ago. The crystal formations trap spirits here, endlessly reliving their final moments.

enemies.name: Frost Bear
enemies.description: A massive bear with ice growing from its shoulders like armor plates. It charges without warning and fights with primal fury.

enemies.name: Ice Harpy
enemies.description: A winged predator with a woman's face and a raptor's talons. Its shriek can freeze blood and shatter concentration.

events.name: Crystal Grove
events.text: A grove of trees frozen in crystal — each one a perfect sculpture of ice. At the center, a large crystal pulses with blue light.

success.text: The crystal shares its memory — an ancient ley line runs beneath this grove. You absorb some of its power.

failure.text: The crystal pulses painfully. Your head throbs for hours after.

success.text: You carefully extract several pristine frost crystals.

failure.text: A crystal shatters in your hands, sending shards everywhere.

success.text: Some beauty is best left untouched.

events.name: Frozen Traveler
events.text: A figure stands frozen mid-stride, preserved perfectly in ice. Their pack is still intact on their back.

choices.label: Thaw the ice carefully to retrieve the pack (INT DC 11)

success.text: The pack contains dried rations, gold, and a journal with useful notes about local dangers.

failure.text: The ice refreezes around your hands. You wrench free but lose feeling for a while.

success.text: The ice shatters. Most of the pack's contents are ruined, but some gold survives.

failure.text: The ice is supernaturally hard. Your arms ache from the effort.

success.text: You mark the location. Maybe someone will come for them someday.

events.name: Phantom Echo
events.text: A translucent figure drifts between the frozen trees, repeating the same words over and over. It seems trapped in a loop.

choices.label: Listen and respond to break the loop (WIS DC 13)

success.text: You speak the words it needs to hear. The phantom dissolves with a sigh, leaving behind spectral residue.

failure.text: Your words anger it. The phantom screams and cold burns through your chest.

choices.label: Dispel it with force of will (INT DC 12)

success.text: You focus your mind and unmake the echo. It drops a crystallized memory.

failure.text: The phantom is too strong. It passes through you, leaving you shaken and cold.

success.text: You give the phantom a wide berth. It continues its endless loop.

events.name: Yeti Territory
events.text: Massive footprints crater the snow. The stench of wet fur hangs in the air. You're in yeti territory.

choices.label: Follow the tracks to the nest (CON DC 12)

success.text: The nest is empty — the yeti is out hunting. You find bones, hides, and a stash of crystals.

failure.text: The yeti returns. You barely escape, battered and bruised.

choices.label: Set a snare and wait (DEX DC 11)

success.text: Your trap catches a smaller beast. You harvest its hide and move on.

failure.text: The snare snaps under the weight. Nothing caught.

success.text: You back away carefully. No need to tempt fate.

events.name: Crumbling Ice Bridge
events.text: A natural bridge of ice spans a deep ravine. It creaks ominously. On the far side, you can see something valuable glinting in the snow.

success.text: You sprint across. The bridge holds — barely. On the other side: a pouch of gold and ore.

failure.text: The bridge cracks. You fall partway before catching yourself, losing skin and pride.

success.text: You find the strongest path and cross safely. The treasure is yours.

failure.text: Your testing weakens the bridge further. It collapses entirely. Opportunity lost.

success.text: You take the long way. Safe but slow.

events.name: Frostbloom Meadow
events.text: A hidden meadow carpeted in frostblooms — rare flowers that only grow where ley lines intersect. They glow softly blue in the eternal twilight.

choices.label: Harvest carefully, preserving the roots (WIS DC 12)

success.text: You gather armfuls of pristine frostblooms without disturbing the ley line.

failure.text: You pull too aggressively. The ley line sparks and the remaining blooms wilt.

success.text: The ley energy flows through you. You feel rejuvenated and enlightened.

failure.text: You can't quiet your mind. The cold seeps in instead.

success.text: You take what you need and leave the rest for the land.
